privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for topocal_env compute_cogo_radiation task. Mathematically verified the theoretical_points calculations based on the provided base station coordinates, azimuths, and distances. Confirmed the expected output file paths match the explicit task description instructions. Discovered a critical defect: both setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 are completely missing from the task environment, which means the initial control dataset (jefferson_county_control.csv) is never created, and the programmatic verifier will perpetually fail due to the missing task_result.json export file.
